emails.body:
Sir, Ma'am,

Attached is the draft itinerary for the Senate briefing trip (14-16 Oct). Highlights:

- Depart DCA 0630 14 Oct, arrive DCA 1945 16 Oct
- Hotel: The Wharf DC, 3 nights, govt rate confirmed
- Ground transport: sedan reserved each day, pickup 0700 at hotel
- Meeting rooms reserved at Dirksen SOB for 15 Oct, 0900-1200 and 1330-1530

Please review and confirm by COB 1 Oct so I can finalize reservations. COL Abreu, your travel orders are routing through G3 now; I'll forward the auth number once cut.

V/r
JIAITF Operations

Operations,

Hotel looks good. Confirming The Wharf DC, 14-16 Oct. I'll need a late check-in note added — flight gets in at 1945, so likely 2030-2100 arrival.

Also, please add a request for a quiet floor (away from elevator/ice machine) if available. Not mission-critical but helps with prep the night before.

Will watch for the travel auth number.

J. Maddox
LCDR, USN

Operations,

On ground transport — can we switch the 15 Oct sedan to an SUV? We're moving the briefing deck, some hard-copy handouts, and a projector backup case. Three people plus gear.

Also, please confirm the driver has Dirksen SOB access clearance. Last time we had a 20-minute delay at the checkpoint.

Thanks.
J. Abreu
COL, USA

COL Abreu, LCDR Maddox,

SUV swapped in for 15 Oct, 0700 pickup at hotel. Driver (Mr. Carlos Reyes) holds current Dirksen badge and completed the SOB access refresher last month — no checkpoint issues expected.

LCDR Maddox: late check-in note added to Wharf reservation. Quiet floor requested; front desk said they'll honor if inventory allows.

Travel auth for COL Abreu: G3 cut orders 26-0921, auth #JIAITF-26-0487. PDF attached to this ticket in DTS.

Let me know if anything else shifts.

Operations

Operations,

Minor change: I need to depart a day early — 13 Oct instead of 14 Oct. Senate staff requested a pre-brief walkthrough on the afternoon of the 13th. Can you add a night at the Wharf (13-14 Oct) and move my DCA departure to 13 Oct, 1400? Return stays 16 Oct 1945.

Also, please cancel the 14 Oct 0630 sedan for me. COL Abreu's transport unchanged.

I'll update my DTS authorization on my end.

J. Maddox

Operations,

Final packet request: please compile the complete travel folder for both of us — orders, hotel confirmations, ground transport details, meeting room info, and the Senate liaison POC sheet. Need PDF and hard copy (2 sets) ready for pickup by 1200 on 13 Oct.

Also confirm the SUV on 15 Oct still has the projector case space. If not, we'll need a roof box or second vehicle.

This should be the last change. Appreciate the quick turns.

J. Abreu
COL, USA
